# @tyravel/mcp

MCP server and capability manifest for Tyravel agents

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/mcp
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.2` |
| Source | [`packages/mcp`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/mcp) |
| Category | AI & agents |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
